description: Create a fully-constrained 2D sketch of a tapered classical guitar fretboard. The fretboard outline is a symmetric trapezoid with a 43.0 mm nut centered at the origin (0,0) and a 56.0 mm top edge located at Y = 480.0 mm. Include three horizontal fret lines with endpoints terminating exactly on the side edges. The perpendicular distances from the nut to the frets are 36.48 mm (Fret 1), 70.92 mm (Fret 2), and 103.46 mm (Fret 3). Save the sketch to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/fretboard.slvs.
